title: Figure 5 in Integrated evidence reveals a new subspecies of the genus Seuratascaris (Nematoda: Ascaridomorpha), with characterization of the complete mitochondrial genome
author: Gu, Xiao-Hong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5. Assemble species by automatic partitioning (ASAP) analyses of Seuratascaris spp. based on different nuclear and mitochondrial genetic markers. Abbreviations: cox1, cytochrome c oxidase subunit I; cox2, cytochrome c oxidase subunit II; rrnS, Small ribosomal RNA; ITS, internal transcribed spacer; OG, out-group. Asterisk indicated the optimal results recommended by ASAP.
